name: Bilbao Flyover
description: Multispectral satellite pass over Bilbao and the north coast of Spain

system_prompts.terrain: Classify this satellite image: percentages of urban, water bodies, rural. Output ONLY JSON: {"classification": {"urban": float, "water bodies": float, "rural": float}}
system_prompts.methane: Detect methane plume sources in urban/industrial areas. Output ONLY JSON: {"detected": boolean, "bbox": [x1,y1,x2,y2]}
system_prompts.fire_risk: Detect fire hotspots in rural/forest areas. Output ONLY JSON: {"detected": boolean, "bbox": [x1,y1,x2,y2]}
system_prompts.algae: Detect algae blooms in water bodies. Output ONLY JSON: {"detected": boolean, "bbox": [x1,y1,x2,y2]}
